name: Losartan
indications:
## Main indications

Hypertension. Angiotensin II antagonist.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 50–100 mg/day PO in 1–2 doses. May be combined with a diuretic.

pediatrico.dose: Hypertension: > 6 years: 0.75 mg/kg once daily, maximum dose: 50 mg/day. Adults: initial: 50 mg/day once daily; maintenance: 25 to 100 mg every 12 - 24 h. In hepatic insufficiency start with 25 mg once daily.
pediatrico.notes: Avoid concomitant use of other renin-angiotensin system inhibitors.

stability:
## Stability

- Store per package insert at room temperature.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Hypotension, diarrhea, asthenia, dizziness, fatigue. Thrombocytopenia, rhabdomyolysis, angioedema.
